writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe your morning routine
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing your morning routine, using Present Simple (I/You/We/They).
writing.sampleAnswer: I wake up at six o'clock every day. I brush my teeth, then I take a shower. I get dressed and eat breakfast at home. I leave home at seven thirty.
checklist: Dùng Present Simple đúng dạng với I (không thêm -s)
Liệt kê ít nhất 4 hoạt động theo thứ tự
Có mốc thời gian cụ thể

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe someone's housework
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing what a family member does at home, using Present Simple (He/She/It).
writing.sampleAnswer: My mother cleans the house and washes the clothes on Saturday. She cooks lunch and tidies the kitchen. My father waters the plants and repairs things.
checklist: Dùng đúng -s/-es/-ies với chủ ngữ He/She/It
Mô tả ít nhất 3 việc nhà
Câu văn rõ ràng, đúng thứ tự
